prompt.description: A description of the music you want to generate.

audio_chords.description: An audio file that will condition the chord progression. You must choose only one among `audio_chords` or `text_chords` above.

temperature.description: Controls the 'conservativeness' of the sampling process. Higher temperature means more diversity.

text_chords.description: A text based chord progression condition. Single uppercase alphabet character(eg. `C`) is considered as a major chord. Chord attributes like(`maj`, `min`, `dim`, `aug`, `min6`, `maj6`, `min7`, `minmaj7`, `maj7`, `7`, `dim7`, `hdim7`, `sus2` and `sus4`) can be added to the root alphabet character after `:`.(eg. `A:min7`) Each chord token splitted by `SPACE` is allocated to a single bar. If more than one chord must be allocated to a single bar, cluster the chords adding with `,` without any `SPACE`.(eg. `C,C:7 G, E:min A:min`) You must choose either only one of `audio_chords` below or `text_chords`.

time_sig.description: Time signature value for the generate output. `text_chords` will be processed based on this value. This will be appended at the end of `prompt`.

top_k.description: Reduces sampling to the k most likely tokens.

top_p.description: Reduces sampling to tokens with cumulative probability of p. When set to  `0` (default), top_k sampling is used.

alpha.description: Interpolation alpha if using two prompts. A value of 0 uses prompt_a fully, a value of 1 uses prompt_b fully

denoising.description: How much to transform input spectrogram

num_inference_steps.description: Number of steps to run the diffusion model

prompt_b.description: The second prompt to interpolate with the first, leave blank if no interpolation

sakemin/musicgen-remixer.description: Remix the music into another styles with MusicGen Chord

prompt.description: A description of the music you want to generate.

beat_sync_threshold.description: When beat syncing, if the gap between generated downbeat timing and input audio downbeat timing is larger than `beat_sync_threshold`, consider the beats are not corresponding. If `None` or `-1`, `1.1/(bpm/60)` will be used as the value. 0.75 is a good value to set.

chroma_coefficient.description: Coefficient value multiplied to multi-hot chord chroma.

classifier_free_guidance.description: Increases the influence of inputs on the output. Higher values produce lower-varience outputs that adhere more closely to inputs.

large_chord_voca.description: If `True`, more chords like 7th, diminished and etc are used. If `False` only 12 major and 12 minor chords are used.

model_version.description: Model type. Computations take longer when using `large` or `stereo` models.

multi_band_diffusion.description: If `True`, the EnCodec tokens will be decoded with MultiBand Diffusion. Not compatible with `stereo` models.

music_input.description: An audio file input for the remix.

return_instrumental.description: If `True`, the instrumental audio will also be returned.

seed.description: Seed for random number generator. If `None` or `-1`, a random seed will be used.

temperature.description: Controls the 'conservativeness' of the sampling process. Higher temperature means more diversity.

sakemin/musicgen-chord.description: Generate music restricted to chord sequences and tempo

prompt.description: A description of the music you want to generate.

audio_chords.description: An audio file that will condition the chord progression. You must choose only one among `audio_chords` or `text_chords` above.

audio_end.description: End time of the audio file to use for chord conditioning. If None, will default to the end of the audio clip.

audio_start.description: Start time of the audio file to use for chord conditioning.

bpm.description: BPM condition for the generated output. `text_chords` will be processed based on this value. This will be appended at the end of `prompt`.

chroma_coefficient.description: Coefficient value multiplied to multi-hot chord chroma.

classifier_free_guidance.description: Increases the influence of inputs on the output. Higher values produce lower-varience outputs that adhere more closely to inputs.

continuation.description: If `True`, generated music will continue from `audio_chords`. If chord conditioning, this is only possible when the chord condition is given with `text_chords`. If `False`, generated music will mimic `audio_chords`'s chord.

duration.description: Duration of the generated audio in seconds.

multi_band_diffusion.description: If `True`, the EnCodec tokens will be decoded with MultiBand Diffusion.

seed.description: Seed for random number generator. If `None` or `-1`, a random seed will be used.

temperature.description: Controls the 'conservativeness' of the sampling process. Higher temperature means more diversity.

text_chords.description: A text based chord progression condition. Single uppercase alphabet character(eg. `C`) is considered as a major chord. Chord attributes like(`maj`, `min`, `dim`, `aug`, `min6`, `maj6`, `min7`, `minmaj7`, `maj7`, `7`, `dim7`, `hdim7`, `sus2` and `sus4`) can be added to the root alphabet character after `:`.(eg. `A:min7`) Each chord token splitted by `SPACE` is allocated to a single bar. If more than one chord must be allocated to a single bar, cluster the chords adding with `,` without any `SPACE`.(eg. `C,C:7 G, E:min A:min`) You must choose either only one of `audio_chords` below or `text_chords`.

time_sig.description: Time signature value for the generate output. `text_chords` will be processed based on this value. This will be appended at the end of `prompt`.

top_k.description: Reduces sampling to the k most likely tokens.

top_p.description: Reduces sampling to tokens with cumulative probability of p. When set to  `0` (default), top_k sampling is used.
